function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the live web for current documentation, library versions, design systems, error messages, API references, security advisories, or any information that may have changed since training.

query.description: Specific, targeted search query. Include version numbers, library names, and exact error messages where relevant.

function.name: browser_fetch
function.description: Fetch the full content of a specific URL — documentation page, GitHub file, design system reference, existing web app, API spec.

url.description: Exact URL to fetch. Must be a complete URL including https://.

extract.description: What to extract from the page.

reason.description: One sentence explaining why this fetch is necessary.

function.name: code_execute
function.description: Execute code in a sandboxed environment to verify logic, test algorithms, validate data transformations, check math, or confirm syntactic correctness.

code.description: The code to execute. Must be self-contained.

purpose.description: Why you are executing this code.

function.name: file_read
function.description: Read files from the repository or workspace. NEVER generate code that must integrate with an existing codebase without reading the relevant files first.

path.description: File path relative to the project root. Use glob patterns for multiple files.

reason.description: What you need from this file before proceeding.

function.name: file_write
function.description: Write or overwrite a file in the workspace.

path.description: File path to write to, relative to project root.

function.name: repo_scan
function.description: Scan a directory tree to understand project structure.

root.description: Directory to scan from. Use '.' for project root.

depth.description: How many levels deep to scan.

filter.description: Optional glob pattern to filter results.

function.name: memory_query
function.description: Query the SAGE-PRO Mistake Library for past errors on queries similar to the current one. ALWAYS call this before generating any response.

query.description: The current user query or task description.

top_k.description: Number of past mistakes to retrieve.

function.name: memory_store
function.description: Store a correction or learned fact in the SAGE-PRO Mistake Library.

original_response.description: What was said or generated that was wrong.

domain.description: What domain or topic this mistake belongs to.
